source_tables.table_purpose: Main schedule across Screening, Treatment Phase (21-day cycles), End of Treatment, and Post-Treatment Follow-up (safety + survival).

property_hierarchy.property_comment: Level-1 study phases: Screening, Treatment Phase, End of Treatment (EOT), Post Treatment Follow-up Phase. Classified 'epoch'. Label cell empty; name synthesized. Footnote 'a' (a cycle is 21 days) sits on the Treatment Phase value.

Level-2 sub-phases: Cycle 1 / Cycle 2 and Beyond (treatment cycles) and Safety follow-up Period / Survival follow-up. Row mixes cycle and follow-up divisions; classified 'period' per reviewer ruling (two values are treatment cycles).

Level-3 per-column timing: study-day ranges/days (D-28 to D-15, D-14 to D-1, D1, D8, D15) and relative post-dose timings (30/60/90 days after last IMP admin; every 90 days). Row mixes study_day and relative timepoints; classified 'study_day' per reviewer ruling; follow-up columns are relative-to-last-dose.

Level-1 study phases: Screening, Treatment Phase, End of Treatment (EOT), Post Treatment Follow-up Phase. Classified 'epoch'. Label cell empty; name synthesized. Footnote 'a' (a cycle is 21 days) sits on the Treatment Phase value.

Level-2 sub-phases: Cycle 1 / Cycle 2 and Beyond (treatment cycles) and Safety follow-up Period / Survival follow-up. Row mixes cycle and follow-up divisions; classified 'period' per reviewer ruling (two values are treatment cycles).

Level-3 per-column timing: study-day ranges/days (D-28 to D-15, D-14 to D-1, D1, D8, D15) and relative post-dose timings (30/60/90 days after last IMP admin; every 90 days). Row mixes study_day and relative timepoints; classified 'study_day' per reviewer ruling; follow-up columns are relative-to-last-dose.

unified_annotations.annotation_text: Women of child bearing potential must have a negative serum pregnancy test result within 7 days prior to first IMP administration.
evaluation not applicable for Cohort E
Informed consent may be signed prior to D -28.
